case_id: GL_Journal entry for Q1 Marketing Campaign

pi_items.source: Task description and metadata match; task.json line 16 specifies this exact description
Task description specifies USD 3500 for both debit and credit lines; metadata.json line 17 specifies 3500.00

Web search of iDempiere DocStatus documentation confirms CO = 'Completed' status. After clicking Post/Complete button on GL Journal, document transitions to Completed (CO) state. Verified via iDempiere wiki Hackers Guide to Documents and multiple DocStatus references.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a GL Journal Entry in iDempiere 12 GardenWorld demo company. The journal entry has description 'Q1 Marketing Campaign - Digital Advertising' with balanced journal lines totaling USD 3500.00 (debit and credit). After posting, the expected document status is CO (Completed). The accounts referenced (62100 Media Advertising, 11100 Checking Account) are standard US Chart of Accounts elements configured in GardenWorld.
